summary: Solid Spring ’90 show with enthusiastic crowd response; audience‑sourced recording captures the vibe though details on sound quality are scarce.
review: The reviewer praises the energy of the Spring‑1990 tour, noting that the crowd’s reaction is goose‑bumps worthy and that the shows were among the last great ones of that era. Jerry’s playing is described as having “moments,” and while the reviewer hints at a decline after Brent’s departure, this particular performance is viewed positively overall. No specific recording issues are mentioned.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one 4‑star review; it highlights a strong performance and good crowd energy with no major complaints, but provides little technical detail on the recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on clarity or mix; the mention of crowd response suggests an audience capture that conveys atmosphere well.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The show is described as part of a great spring tour with high energy and solid playing, especially from Jerry, though the reviewer hints at future decline after Brent's departure.

band_member_comments.Keys: Reference to Brent’s eventual departure implying later decline; no specific comment on his playing here.
